name: Stamp It Puzzle game
description: Are you ready to challenge your mind with an exciting puzzle game? In Stamped it puzzle you step into the shoes of an airport security officer, where your mission is to control a cube stamp, collect ink, and stamp passports with precision. This engaging game combines logic, strategy, and fun, making it perfect for puzzle enthusiasts! Brain Training Challenges: Participate in engaging challenges that sharpen your logic and critical thinking skills.
instructions: Left Right Up amp Down Arrows for movement
